item.title: This is somewhat true Christian evangelical as well but Mormons really do take up an incredible space in influencer spaces, and ...
item.description:
This is somewhat true Christian evangelical as well but Mormons really do take up an incredible space in influencer spaces, and they don’t have beliefs that are that different than Scientology, and yet they have achieved a certain level of normalisation and self victimisation that other cultures just simply haven’t: their 300 billion probly helps with that #greenscreenvideo

item.title: Or more so at thesis on why you should fight this both inside America and outside it, because it is a fundamental powerful tool ...
item.description:
Or more so at thesis on why you should fight this both inside America and outside it, because it is a fundamental powerful tool of imperial propaganda

item.title: Idea ologies will do what is profitable not necessarily what it’s true so it’s often not productive to engage with them as if th...
item.description:
Idea ologies will do what is profitable not necessarily what it’s true so it’s often not productive to engage with them as if they are doing what is true rather than just what makes the money#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Beyond just being disgusting, there is a reason that this is done and a reason this is normal bc sexuality and horniness have lo...
item.description:
Beyond just being disgusting, there is a reason that this is done and a reason this is normal bc sexuality and horniness have long been way too fast track normality of extreme crimes
